ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each course (Subject No.) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "ltp_format" TEXT /* Format of lectures, tutorials, and practical sessions */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credits assigned to the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., CORE, Departmental Elective) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "syllabus" TEXT /* Course syllabus */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_outcome" TEXT /* Course learning outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the faculty member belongs */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_faculty" (
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the student belongs */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the university */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student is enrolled (e.g., Autumn, Spring) */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year in which the student is enrolled */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course to which the resource belongs */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., textbook, lecture notes, video) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "course_id" TEXT /* ID of the course being reviewed */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who wrote the review */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
